title: Vitax Acer Feed, Suitable For All Japanese Maple In Borders, Pots & Containers, Promotes For Strong Healthy Growth: 0.9Kg Pouch
features: IMPROVES PLANT HEALTH: The specially formulated Acer Feed Encourages healthy leaf growth and vibrant colours for stunning foliage.
LONG-LASTING ORGANIC ACER FEED: One application lasts a whole season, providing a slow, steady release of nutrients.
NUTRIENT-RICH FORMULA:Vitax Acer Feed contains nitrogen, phosphate, potash, natural magnesium, and trace elements.
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Ideal for use during planting and as a top dressing in spring.
EASY TO USE: Simply fork into the soil and water well during dry weather for maximum benefit.
